cognition.rationale: I decided to operate the ORPI journal as a two-tier system: this public repository for governance, architectural, and reflective records, and a private companion repository for tactical operational records involving specific third parties before their involvement is voluntary. The disclosure policy governing the split is committed to this public repository at policies/journal-disclosure-policy-v1.json and is normative. Governance decisions about ODS-Foundation are recorded publicly; operational records that reference specific individuals or organizations before their involvement is voluntary are recorded privately. This mirrors the standard practice of mature open-source foundations and standards bodies, which combine public governance records with private working-group discussions. The compounding intelligence value of the journal does not require all entries to be visible to all parties.

counterfactuals.alternative_action: Operate a single fully public journal
Operate a single fully private journal
